message.content:
@startuml
actor User

participant QuerySet
participant QueryParser
participant Tokenizer
participant Query
participant QueryComponent

User -> QuerySet : **1** QuerySet()
User -> QuerySet : **2** add("longitude", "*/CLON")
QuerySet -> QueryParser : **3** parse(queryString)
QueryParser -> Tokenizer : **4** tokenize(queryString)
Tokenizer --> QueryParser : **5** tokens

loop [all sub-queries]
    QueryParser -> Query : **6** Query()
    loop [all components]
        QueryParser -> QueryComponent : **7** QueryComponent()
        QueryParser -> Query : **8** push_back(component)
    end
end

QueryParser --> QuerySet : **9** queries

@enduml
